firecrawl.markdown:
María Peláe
===========

[Ver todos los eventos](https://visitasevilla.es/ahora-en-sevilla/)

30.05.26 ![](http://tic.visitasevilla.es/vsev/web_php/imatges/esdeveniments/31605698dbd130d708415545028.jpg)

Con El Evangelio, María Peláe se adentra en un concepto audaz y provocador, donde cada canción es un testimonio contado desde la verdad de su protagonista. Un disco que refuerza su compromiso con la autenticidad y la reivindicación a través de la música. Gracias a su carisma en el escenario y su poderosa puesta en escena, sus conciertos se convierten en una experiencia inolvidable, en los que la pasión y la emoción van de la mano con la fiesta y la reivindicación.

[Tickets](https://insolitosevilla.com/conference-event/maria-pelae/)

Lo que necesitas saber está en tu correo

hasDescription.longDescription: With El Evangelio, María Peláe delves into a bold and provocative concept, where each song is a testimony told from the truth of its protagonist. An album that reinforces her commitment to authenticity and advocacy through music. Thanks to her charisma on stage and her powerful performance, her concerts become an unforgettable experience, where passion and emotion go hand in hand with celebration and advocacy.
hasDescription.shortDescription: Concert by María Peláe presenting her album 'El Evangelio'.

hasAdditionalInformation.accessTip: We recommend arriving early to enjoy the event.
hasAdditionalInformation.conditions: Limited tickets, advance booking is recommended.
hasAdditionalInformation.curiosities: María Peláe is known for her powerful voice and connection with the audience.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: Is there access for people with reduced mobility?

hasAdditionalInformation.remarks: It is recommended to wear comfortable clothing and be prepared to enjoy.
